chat.title: Chat with Krishi Sakhi
chat.subtitle: Your AI farming assistant - available in multiple languages
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm Krishi Sakhi. You can ask me any farming-related questions.
chat.quickQuestionsDesc: Tap to ask common farming questions
chat.aiServicesDesc: What Krishi Sakhi can help with
chat.error: I'm sorry, I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again later.

services.cropAdvice: Crop-specific advice for cardamom, pepper, coffee

hero.title: Your AI Farming
hero.subtitle: Personalized support for every crop cycle. Empowering Kerala's farmers with AI-powered insights, local expertise, and digital tools.

features.title: Comprehensive Digital Farming
features.subtitle: Solution
features.description: Six core features designed specifically for Kerala's smallholder farmers, backed by extensive research and local agricultural expertise.

farmerProfiling.title: Farmer & Farm Profiling
farmerProfiling.description: Rich dashboard with geo-mapping, crop portfolio tracking, and agro-ecological data for personalized advisories.

conversationalInterface.title: Conversational Interface
conversationalInterface.description: Voice and text chat in Malayalam and English. Ask natural questions about your crops and get instant expert advice.

digitalDiary.title: Digital Farm Diary
digitalDiary.description: Track farming activities, log events with photos, and build valuable data for insurance claims and learning.

aiAdvisory.title: AI Advisory Engine
aiAdvisory.description: Proactive recommendations based on weather, growth stages, and local conditions. Smart alerts for optimal farming.

smartAlerts.title: Smart Alerts & Reminders
smartAlerts.description: Never miss critical farming operations, subsidy deadlines, or market opportunities. Customizable notifications.

knowledgeHub.title: Knowledge Hub
knowledgeHub.description: Searchable repository of local crop calendars, pest databases, best practices, and success stories from Kerala farmers.

footer.tagline: Empowering Kerala's farmers with AI-powered digital farming solutions.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Karshakan Setu. A Government of Kerala Initiative. All rights reserved.

profile.title: Farmer Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your farming profile and farm details
profile.farmDetailsDesc: Geographic and physical details of your farm
profile.farmLocationMapDesc: Interactive map with GPS coordinates and farm boundaries

dashboard.trackGrowthStage: Track growth stage, weather and AI tips
dashboard.stayOnTop: Stay on top of key actions

policies.title: Government Policies & Schemes
policies.subtitle: Comprehensive directory of agricultural policies, schemes, and financial support programs
policies.quickReferenceTable: Quick reference table for all schemes
policies.youAppearEligible: ✓ You appear to be eligible for this scheme!
policies.proceedWithApplication: Proceed with the application process or contact your nearest agriculture office.
policies.mayNotMeetCriteria: ✗ You may not meet all eligibility criteria
policies.verifyRequirements: Please verify requirements with local agriculture officials.

pmKisan.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
pmKisan.description: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year to eligible farmer families
pmKisan.applicationProcess: Online through PM-KISAN portal or CSC centers

pmfby.name: PMFBY (Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana)
pmfby.description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme providing financial support against crop losses
pmfby.benefits: Up to sum insured for crop losses due to natural calamities
pmfby.applicationProcess: Through banks, CSCs, or agriculture offices during enrollment period

nabardKerala.name: NABARD Special Funds for Kerala Agriculture
nabardKerala.description: Concessional credit for agriculture and allied activities in Kerala
nabardKerala.benefits: Low interest rates (4-7%), flexible repayment terms
nabardKerala.applicationProcess: Through NABARD partner banks and financial institutions

worldBankKera.name: World Bank KERA Project
worldBankKera.description: Kerala Rural Transformation Project for improving agricultural productivity
worldBankKera.benefits: $200M project funding for infrastructure and capacity building
worldBankKera.applicationProcess: Through Kerala State Rural Development Agency

keralaOrganic.name: Kerala Organic Farming Promotion Scheme
keralaOrganic.description: State initiative to promote organic farming practices and certification
keralaOrganic.benefits: 75% subsidy for organic certification, input support
keralaOrganic.applicationProcess: Through District Collectors and Agriculture Department

spiceDevelopment.name: Spice Development Program
spiceDevelopment.description: Specialized scheme for cardamom, pepper, and other spice crop development
spiceDevelopment.benefits: Subsidized inputs, processing equipment, market linkages
spiceDevelopment.applicationProcess: Through Spices Board and District Spice Development Officers
